findings.title: Default native state model did not cover all 512 canonical realms
findings.evidence: swift test --package-path MaciOS passes with coverage for 512 states, 32 orbit representatives, and 8,192 transitions.
findings.root_cause: The default valid-state set was limited to `.zero` instead of all well-formed realms.
findings.remediation: Default `ASHStateModel` now uses the canonical 512-state space while restricted valid-state behavior remains available through explicit initialization.

findings.title: Realm IDs used non-canonical native prefix
findings.evidence: Realm encoder tests verify APS-REALM-000 through APS-REALM-511.
findings.root_cause: Realm identity generation used the prior state-signature prefix rather than canonical numeric realm identifiers.
findings.remediation: Realm encoder now emits canonical realm identifiers from the state raw value and tests cover all 512 identifiers.

findings.title: Package-required protected-surface verifier is absent
findings.evidence: python3 tools/verify_protected_surface.py --mode product --write-baseline passes and writes completion-evidence/protected-surface-baseline.json.
findings.root_cause: The platform repository did not include a repository-local product verifier for protected surface changes.
findings.remediation: Added a verifier and unit tests that fail when protected paths have tracked or untracked changes and record hashed clean-state evidence.

findings.title: Platform packaging and signing evidence is not present
findings.evidence: SwiftPM and Xcode package scheme builds pass, but the repository contains Swift package products only; no app archive, signing, notarization, App Store, or TestFlight artifacts are present.
findings.root_cause: The repository has no app targets, archive schemes, signing settings, entitlements, or distribution credentials.
findings.remediation: Define the app targets and distribution choices, add archive/export workflows, configure signing inputs, then verify archive, signing, notarization, store upload, and install paths.

findings.title: Exact iOS completion branch is tracked in a separate worktree
findings.evidence: Current branch is release/aps-macos-1.0.0-completion-clean; iOS package work is present on release/aps-ios-1.0.0-completion-clean in a separate worktree.
findings.root_cause: The macOS and iOS package branch names are separate while the repository source tree is shared.
findings.remediation: Keep branch-specific evidence in separate worktrees and verify both branches independently.

findings.title: Hosted branch protection is not active
findings.evidence: Authenticated API reads show zero active rulesets and HTTP 404 for default branch protection on main.
findings.affected_capability: hosted branch protection and merge governance
findings.root_cause: The hosted repository has no active rulesets and the default branch is not protected.
findings.remediation: Restore or define the required hosted check family, configure branch protection or rulesets for main and active release branches, then recapture authenticated evidence.
